_comment: v1.1-P1 / ADR 0017 allow-list for Command::new(bash|sh|...) sites.
Empty by design at v1.1-P1 landing: the Rust CLI does not execute bash at any source location.
Additions require panel review per ADR 0017 § Dev-tool dependency governance.
Format: one path (relative to repo root) per entry under exempt_paths.
